title: heater operation
description: Single-stream heater. Given the thermal power Q (positive heats, negative cools), the outlet temperature follows from the enthalpy balance.

Q.title: Thermal power
Q.description: Thermal power delivered to the stream; positive heats, negative cools.

Tref.title: Enthalpy reference temperature
Tref.description: Reference for the enthalpy integrals; only differences enter the balance.
